comment.body: I don’t mean trust her or care about how her trades went, I mean trade them yourself. And manage the trade yourself. Honestly, then you will understand because currently you do not. If you did you wouldn’t be quibbling. No one is always right but Alma is very often right, and you could see that for yourself. Up to you to take the effort to see that. Even look back at the signals (with a stop loss in mind) and examine the charts. It’s all there. For your own sake, that’s the only thing that will assuage your doubts.

comment.body:
Honestly, we veered way off-topic over one fool. We don’t know how much capital Alma’s trading with, and it’s neither polite nor even legal to pry into that. She’s not some pump-’n-dump furu. She even dedicated a whole post to handle people like you.
Back to the point.. Alma shared a really personal concern with us, she’s visibly exhausted and driven by perfectionism to give us her absolute best. Poor thing almost started blaming herself when we didn’t get a bottom signal. Thank god she checked her own chat history lol.
I reckon the least we can do in return is actually spend the time to understand her work, cause if we don’t, she’ll dip on us. And like our boy deltaboy said, Alma’s reports are on a completely different level than the ones you get for a 1000 buck sub if you have institutional credentials

comment.body:
Originally, the dealer-flow model said that if volatility starts to fall above 5,709 the price action can climb the gamma. That’s because traders trade based on their positioning and want the price to go up. If volatility had broken out instead, that stabilizing effect wouldn’t have kicked in.
But when the put signal came in, she said that at 5,720 you need to pay attention to how sharply volatility is dropping, cause there was a big local long gamma exposure there.. and since that Trump pump was pretty fragile and looked ripe for mean reversion, even a small shock could break it. So if volatility eases here, it means the squeeze is over and the move is at the mercy of dealer flow..which, given the upside long gamma, means they’ll be selling
The contextual difference is really important. Hope that makes sense
